title: Maris True Identity
wikitext:
[]: Mari's True Identity [SUPER HUGE SPOILERS]             Quote Post by skikes » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:22 pm Mari is... THE CLONE OF NAOKO AKAGI!!!!!!! and theres probs a bit of angel in there too! Anno came to me in a dream and spoke how mari came to be! He told me it happened exactly the same way it happened to Rei and i replied "but anno how exactly did Rei come to be" and i woke up ¬_¬ BEHOLD!

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:27 pm HMMMMMMMMMMMMM....................... But Skikes, Mari is FAR too nice to Shin-chan to be Naoko, I was always under the impression that she wasn't too fond of Shin-chan from watching the flashback episode, not to mention the part of her not being much of a mother. I know you said that there may be some angel in her as well, but I always had the ideal that she didn't care for Yui's son either. I may be wrong though. And, YAY! First post!

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 24, 2009 9:53 pm If her chest has still got dat bounce & jiggle, Im cool widdit.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Aug 24, 2009 10:15 pm uhhh... isnt this the same stuff in the mari speculation thread??

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Aug 24, 2009 11:05 pm I think I can smell a lock coming along. Who know's Ive been wrong before.

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Mon Aug 24, 2009 11:57 pm I really doubt it. I see no glasses =/. But I will say it was an interesting idea. Good picture edit btw. When I first glanced at it I thought it was like official artwork lol.

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Tue Aug 25, 2009 6:05 am Obviously, the only way to confirm or deny this is for someone to shop some glasses onto the good doctor. Someone get on that.

[]:             Quote Post by trueno_twentyone » Tue Aug 25, 2009 7:13 am wonderluster wrote: If her chest has still got dat bounce & jiggle, Im cool widdit.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Aug 25, 2009 7:44 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: Obviously, the only way to confirm or deny this is for someone to shop some glasses onto the good doctor. Someone get on that.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Tue Aug 25, 2009 8:43 am master_lloyd wrote: It's like they were the same person!

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue Aug 25, 2009 10:21 am My tireless hours in photoshop weren't wasted then...

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 25, 2009 2:50 pm You know, aside from pink not being her color, Naoko looks right in a plug suit. But Skikes, Mari is FAR too nice to Shin-chan to be Naoko

[]:             Quote Post by Evafan » Tue Aug 25, 2009 6:30 pm master_lloyd wrote: My tireless hours in photoshop weren't wasted then...

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue Aug 25, 2009 8:59 pm master_lloyd wrote: MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: Obviously, the only way to confirm or deny this is for someone to shop some glasses onto the good doctor. Someone get on that.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Tue Aug 25, 2009 10:15 pm Oh no you di-ent! ( snaps fingers all over the place ) But I think you both did well, first one being a more Look What I Did perspective, yeah I must say it's very well done! and the Second being something to make us all laugh ( LiLi too ). Can't we all just get along?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Tue Aug 25, 2009 10:20 pm Forgive me for going off topic, but I cant help but notice how kawaii the little Rei throwing a tantrum emoticon is!

[]:             Quote Post by skikes » Tue Aug 25, 2009 10:26 pm Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: Forgive me for going off topic, but I cant help but notice how kawaii the little Rei throwing a tantrum emoticon is!

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Wed Aug 26, 2009 8:38 am Hmmm, i wonder whether the good doctors attraction towards Gendo was purely the result of a midlife crisis, or was it more biological in nature. G/M 4ever.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Aug 26, 2009 9:53 pm So just who WAS the father anyways?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed Oct 13, 2010 2:36 am Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: YAY! First post!
